failures.user_input: What are the ESD protection ratings (HBM and CDM) for the ESP32?
In the ESP32 GPIO_Matrix, what is signal number 63 and does it have a corresponding IO_MUX core input?
Compare the maximum ADC sampling rates for the DIG and RTC controllers, and identify the required test conditions for these specifications.
Which cryptographic hardware acceleration features are included in the security specifications, particularly concerning SHA-2?

In the context of the ESP32 power scheme and pin definitions, what are the specific power domains and functional characteristics associated with the VDD3P3_RTC and VDD3P3_SDIO pins, and how does the internal LDO behave when VDD_SDIO is connected to the same PCB net as VDD3P3_RTC?
What are the absolute maximum voltage and storage temperature ratings for the ESP32 according to the datasheet?
Which pins are ADC2_CH5 and ADC1_CH4 connected to on the ESP32, and what other peripheral functions share those pins?
If VDD_SDIO is connected to the same PCB net as VDD3P3_RTC, how is the internal LDO affected and what is the status of the internal 6 $\Omega$ resistor?
The MTDI pin on the ESP32 is a strapping pin. What voltage does it control, and what ADC and touch sensor functions does it also serve?
What is the Wi-Fi receiver sensitivity for 802.11b at 1 Mbps and for 802.11n HT20 MCS7 on the ESP32?
Can you detail the technical specifications regarding Bluetooth LE compliance, sensitivity, and controller capabilities listed in the features?
SENSOR_CAPN pin number type and function list
